_authored_by: Board Advisor 2026-05-01 — derived from CoS draft on QUA-699 first-heartbeat audit; ratified by OWNER directive Tuesday-prep + companion to DL-055 (DevOps token-burn watch) and DL-056 (CoS).
_purpose: Per-adapter token budget guards. CoS reads this on every audit to compute per-agent forecast vs cap; if forecast hits alarm or hard-stop threshold within escalation_window_days, CoS escalates to CEO via QUA-699 rolling tracker.
_origin_evidence: Codex token quota exhausted 2026-05-01 ~12:00 UTC with zero days warning — this file is the corrective so future exhaustions are forecast 4+ days early.

claude_local._per_agent_monthly_budget_note: $50/agent/month. Sonnet roles (CoS, Doc-KM, QB, QT) typically much lower; Opus roles (CEO, Research) higher. Adjust per-agent in companion overrides if needed.

codex_local._per_agent_monthly_budget_note: $30/agent/month — note Codex API spend is NOT captured in Paperclip API spentMonthlyCents field today; tracker has to read provider-side billing.

company._monthly_budget_note: $300/month total cap. Verify against actual provider statements; this is a starter ceiling.

_escalation_window_note: If forecast says exhaustion within 4 days at current run-rate, CoS escalates THIS heartbeat per DL-056. Avoids the 0-day-warning failure mode (Codex 2026-05-01).

alarm_actions.alarm_threshold_pct: post anomaly comment on QUA-699; CoS daily rollup includes per-agent burn rate
alarm_actions.hard_stop_pct: escalate to CEO with WHAT/WHY/IMPACT/TRADEOFF/RECOMMENDED-DECISION; CEO decides agent pause, model downgrade, or budget bump

per_agent_overrides._note: If a specific agent has different cap (e.g. CEO needs more for strategic decisions), override here. Empty by default; CoS+CEO populate as patterns emerge.

7795b4b0-8ecd-46da-ab22-06def7c8fa2d._note: CEO Opus runs more tokens for strategic work; +60% over default.

7aef7a17-d010-4f6e-a198-4a8dc5deb40d._note: Research Opus extracts cards from sources; reading-heavy; +20%.

_cross_references: DL-055 — DevOps token-burn watch via QUA-527 (data producer)
DL-056 — CoS hire (data consumer + interpreter; reads this file every heartbeat)
DL-046 — anti-theater (alarm spam forbidden; comment on rolling tracker, not new issues)
QUA-699 — CoS rolling tracker (where alarms surface)
Codex 2026-05-01 outage — the failure mode this file exists to prevent
